# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-health-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8085
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8086
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow api-gateway to reach user-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow api-gateway to reach order-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow order-service to reach payment-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-payment-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow order-service to reach inventory-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow payment-service and order-service to reach notification-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-order-to-notification-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow user-service and order-service to reach database-proxy
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: services-to-database-proxy
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow api-gateway to reach inventory-service (e.g., stock checks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow kubelet health probes (unauthenticated) on user-service health port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: health-probes-user-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-health-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow monitoring namespace to reach admin endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: monitoring-to-api-gateway-admin
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
        - name: grafana
          namespace: monitoring

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow ingress controller to reach api-gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx
          namespace: ingress-system

---
# ServiceAccount definitions for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
    mesh: zero-trust
